instruction: Extract structured medical SOAP and SBAR note data as JSON
input: Date/Time: 03/10/2026 1400 Patient alert and oriented x3. Reports increased shortness of breath with minimal exertion. Respirations labored at times. Lung sounds with bilateral crackles at bases. SpO2 90% on room air; placed on 2 L nasal cannula with improvement to 95%. +2 pitting edema noted to bilateral lower extremities. Patient states breathing is harder when walking.

SOAP.subject: Patient reports shortness of breath when walking.
SOAP.objective: Labored respirations with bilateral crackles at lung bases. SpO2 improved from 90% RA to 95% on 2L NC. +2 edema BLE.
SOAP.assessment: Shortness of breath likely related to fluid overload.
SOAP.plan: Maintain oxygen therapy and notify provider.

SBAR.situation: Patient experiencing increased shortness of breath.
SBAR.background: History of worsening fatigue and dyspnea.
SBAR.assessment: Signs consistent with possible fluid overload.

instruction: Extract structured medical SOAP and SBAR note data as JSON
input: Date/Time: 03/10/2026 0800 Patient complains of chest tightness since last night. Skin pale and diaphoretic. SpO2 improved from 94% to 98% on oxygen. BP 168/102 HR 110.

SOAP.objective: Pale and diaphoretic skin. Elevated BP and HR.

instruction: Extract structured medical SOAP and SBAR note data as JSON
input: Date/Time: 03/10/2026 1600 Patient confused to date and reports feeling out of it. BP 88/54 HR 118 Temp 101.2F. Decreased urine output noted.

SOAP.subject: Patient reports feeling out of it.
SOAP.objective: Hypotension, fever, tachycardia and decreased urine output.
SOAP.plan: Administer IV fluids and obtain cultures.

SBAR.situation: Patient with new confusion and hypotension.
